holdings.infoBox: SEIS is an equity ETF with a total of 367 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 1.45%, TTM Technologies at 1.29%, Sterling Infrastructure at 1.26%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 1.21%, and CNO Financial Group at 1.19%.

overview.description: The SEI Select Small Cap ETF (SEIS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation through investments in small-cap US stocks. The selection process integrates the advisers proprietary quantitative model with recommendations from one or more sub-advisers. SEIS was launched on Jul 31, 2024 and is issued by SEI.
